Headline: Closure - Prestwich Preparatory School (Independent), Prestwich, Manchester
Info: This independent prep school is closing, giving parents paying £8,000 annually only three weeks' notice to find alternative education for their children.

Headline: Closure (VAT Impact) - Exeter Cathedral School (Independent), Exeter, Devon
Info: The 850-year-old prep school announced its closure, citing "unavoidable financial pressures" and explicitly blaming the impending Labour VAT raid on private school fees.

Headline: Closure (VAT Impact) - Royal High Prep School (Independent), Bath, Somerset
Info: Mary Berry's alma mater, a 150-year-old prep school, is closing its doors, with the institution explicitly blaming the Labour party's proposed VAT hike on school fees.

Headline: Merger Cancelled - St Lawrence College (Independent), Ramsgate, Kent
Info: St Lawrence College in Ramsgate abruptly halted its planned merger with Dover College with immediate effect, reversing a significant strategic decision for both independent schools.

Headline: Merger - Two Salisbury Schools (Independent), Salisbury, Wiltshire
Info: A new headteacher has been appointed to lead the major merger of two independent schools in Salisbury, indicating a concrete step towards their consolidation.
